top_signals.title: Montage sees Côte d’Ivoire’s Didievi as next gold asset
top_signals.summary: Shares rose after high-grade drill results at Didievi project in Côte d’Ivoire boosted confidence in a future gold development asset.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Canadian Copper advances Murray Brook with EIA filing
top_signals.summary: Canadian Copper (CSE: CCI) has submitted its Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) registration document for its Murray Brook deposit to New Brunswick’s department […]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Over 95% of Coinbase’s code is now written with AI
top_signals.summary: Coinbase’s Rob Witoff said the company is leaning more on AI to help with execution, but still needs high-agency humans for judgment and strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: British Columbia issues environmental assessment for Vitreo’s $300M silica sand mine
top_signals.summary: The EAO concluded that the Angus project would not cause significant adverse effects once mitigation measures and proposed conditions are applied.

top_signals.title: Abasca expands Loki graphite resource in Saskatchewan
top_signals.summary: The company's upgrades to Loki graphite resource in Saskatchewan, strengthens plans for a PEA and fast-tracks production.
